mapper.select: SELECT ORCSKEY ,ORCSNAME ,VALUE1 ,VALUE2 ,DEFAULTVALUE FROM TORDER_SET_ORCS
SELECT ORCSKEY ,ORCSNAME ,VALUE1 ,VALUE2 ,DEFAULTVALUE FROM TORDER_SET_ORCS

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TORDER_MST_ORCD_DT WHERE LAKEY = #{lakey}
AND (ORCD_HDKEY LIKE '%' || #{value} || '%' OR ORCD_DTKEY LIKE '%'|| #{value} || '%' OR ORCD_DTNAME LIKE '%'|| #{value} || '%' OR ORCD_DTVALUE LIKE '%'|| #{value} || '%')

#{GRIDPAGING_ROWNUMTYPE_TOP} SELECT B.* FROM(
SELECT ORCSKEY AS FIELD1 ,ORCSNAME AS FIELD2 FROM TORDER_SET_ORCS
WHERE (ORCSKEY LIKE '%' || #{value} || '%' OR ORCSNAME LIKE '%' || #{value} || '%')
)B
ORDER BY #{colName} DESC
ORDER BY #{colName} ASC
ORDER BY FIELD1 ASC
#{GRIDPAGING_ROWNUMTYPE_BOTTOM}
SELECT ORCD_HDKEY, ORCD_DTKEY, ORCD_DTORDER, ORCD_DTNAME, LAKEY FROM TORDER_MST_ORCD_DT
SELECT ORCD_HDKEY ,ORCD_DTKEY ,ORCD_DTNAME FROM TORDER_MST_ORCD_DT WHERE LAKEY = #{lakey} ORDER BY ORCD_HDKEY , ORCD_DTORDER
SELECT EQKEY ,PRTYPE ,EQTYPE ,EQNM ,IPADDR FROM TADMIN_MST_EQ

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TADMIN_MST_STORE WHERE CLOSDATE >= #{sysdate} AND DELYN = 'N' AND STORETYPE = '0'
AND (STOREKEY LIKE '%' || #{value} || '%' OR STORENM LIKE '%'|| #{value} || '%' )

#{GRIDPAGING_ROWNUMTYPE_TOP} SELECT B.* FROM ( SELECT STOREKEY FIELD1 ,STORENM FIELD2 FROM TADMIN_MST_STORE WHERE CLOSDATE >= #{sysdate} AND DELYN = 'N' AND STORETYPE = '0'
AND (STOREKEY LIKE '%' || #{value} || '%' OR STORENM LIKE '%'|| #{value} || '%' )
)B
ORDER BY #{colName} DESC
ORDER BY #{colName} ASC
ORDER BY FIELD1 ASC
#{GRIDPAGING_ROWNUMTYPE_BOTTOM}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TADMIN_MST_ADDR_T WHERE DELYN = 'N'
AND (ADDRID LIKE '%' || #{value} || '%' OR CTYNM LIKE '%'|| #{value} || '%' OR STNM LIKE '%'|| #{value} || '%' OR UNIT LIKE '%'|| #{value} || '%' OR ZIPCD LIKE '%'|| #{value} || '%')
AND OWKEY IN
#{OWKEY_SELECTION_VALUE}

SELECT COUNT (1) FROM TORDER_MST_POGRP WHERE DELYN = 'N'
AND ( POGRPKEY LIKE '%' || #{value} || '%' OR POGRPNAME LIKE '%'|| #{value} || '%' OR OWKEY LIKE '%'|| #{value} || '%' )
AND OWKEY IN
#{OWKEY_SELECTION_VALUE}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ( SELECT REPACKEY AS ACKEY ,OWKEY FROM TADMIN_MST_AC GROUP BY REPACKEY, OWKEY ) A INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_AC B ON A.ACKEY = B.ACKEY AND A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY WHERE 1 = 1
AND (B.ACKEY LIKE '%'|| #{value} || '%' OR B.ACNM LIKE '%'|| #{value} || '%' OR B.ACNM LIKE '%'|| #{value} || '%')
AND A.OWKEY IN
#{OWKEY_SELECTION_VALUE}

#{GRIDPAGING_ROWNUMTYPE_TOP} SELECT TB2.ORCD_DTKEY AS FIELD1 ,TB2.ORCD_DTNAME AS FIELD2
FROM TORDER_MST_ORCD_HD TB1 INNER JOIN TORDER_MST_ORCD_DT TB2 ON TB1.ORCD_HDKEY = TB2.ORCD_HDKEY WHERE TB1.ORCD_HDKEY = 'OM_MT_CT_MOVE_RSN'
AND TB2.LAKEY = #{lakey}
ORDER BY #{colName} DESC
ORDER BY #{colName} ASC
ORDER BY FIELD1 ASC
#{GRIDPAGING_ROWNUMTYPE_BOTTOM}

WITH RECURSIVE menu_tree AS ( SELECT URKEY, MEKEY, MENAME, MEORDER, EQTYPE, USKEY, UPPERMEKEY, ISSEPARATOR, ISLEAF, COMMENTS, 0 AS MELVL, ARRAY[UPPERMEKEY, MEORDER] AS sort_path FROM TORDER_MST_URDFME WHERE URKEY = #{surkey} AND UPPERMEKEY = '0' UNION ALL SELECT c.URKEY, c.MEKEY, c.MENAME, c.MEORDER, c.EQTYPE, c.USKEY, c.UPPERMEKEY, c.ISSEPARATOR, c.ISLEAF, c.COMMENTS, p.MELVL + 1, p.sort_path || ARRAY[c.UPPERMEKEY, c.MEORDER] FROM TORDER_MST_URDFME c INNER JOIN menu_tree p ON c.UPPERMEKEY = p.MEKEY WHERE c.URKEY = #{surkey} ) SELECT URKEY, MEKEY, MENAME, MEORDER, EQTYPE, USKEY, UPPERMEKEY, ISSEPARATOR, ISLEAF, COMMENTS, MELVL FROM menu_tree ORDER BY sort_path

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ( SELECT A.OWKEY, A.ACKEY, A.ICKEY, B.ICNM, C.ACNM FROM TADMIN_MST_CTXACXIC A INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_IC B ON A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND A.ICKEY = B.ICKEY INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_AC C ON A.ACKEY = C.ACKEY AND A.ACKEY = C.ACKEY AND A.OWKEY = C.OWKEY GROUP BY A.OWKEY, A.ACKEY, A.ICKEY, B.ICNM, C.ACNM ) WHERE 1 = 1
AND OWKEY IN
#{OWKEY_SELECTION_VALUE}
AND ( ACKEY LIKE '#{value}' || '%' OR ICKEY LIKE '#{value}' || '%' OR ICNM LIKE '%' || '#{value}' || '%' OR ACNM LIKE '%' || '#{value}' || '%' )

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TADMIN_MST_IC WHERE 1 = 1
AND OWKEY IN
#{OWKEY_SELECTION_VALUE}
AND ICKEY = '#{value}'

SELECT ICKEY AS FIELD1, ICNM AS FIELD2 FROM TADMIN_MST_IC WHERE 1 = 1
AND OWKEY IN
#{OWKEY_SELECTION_VALUE}
AND ICKEY = '#{value}'

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TADMIN_MST_CTG WHERE CLOSDATE >= #{sysdate} AND DELYN = 'N' AND CTGLV = '1'
AND (CTGKEY LIKE '%' || #{value} || '%' OR CTGNM LIKE '%'|| #{value} || '%' )
AND OWKEY IN
#{OWKEY_SELECTION_VALUE}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TADMIN_MST_CTG WHERE CLOSDATE >= #{sysdate} AND DELYN = 'N' AND CTGLV = '2'
AND (CTGKEY LIKE '%' || #{value} || '%' OR CTGNM LIKE '%'|| #{value} || '%' )
AND OWKEY IN
#{OWKEY_SELECTION_VALUE}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TADMIN_MST_CTG WHERE CLOSDATE >= #{sysdate} AND DELYN = 'N' AND CTGLV = '3'
AND (CTGKEY LIKE '%' || #{value} || '%' OR CTGNM LIKE '%'|| #{value} || '%' )
AND OWKEY IN
#{OWKEY_SELECTION_VALUE}

#{GRIDPAGING_ROWNUMTYPE_TOP} SELECT TB2.ORCD_DTKEY AS FIELD1 ,TB2.ORCD_DTNAME AS FIELD2
FROM TORDER_MST_ORCD_HD TB1 INNER JOIN TORDER_MST_ORCD_DT TB2 ON TB1.ORCD_HDKEY = TB2.ORCD_HDKEY WHERE TB1.ORCD_HDKEY = 'OM_INV_TYPE_CHG'
AND TB2.LAKEY = #{lakey}
ORDER BY #{colName} DESC
ORDER BY #{colName} ASC
ORDER BY FIELD1 ASC
#{GRIDPAGING_ROWNUMTYPE_BOTTOM}
